description.value: Aura moderate necromancy; CL 10th; Slot headband; Price 11,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This item is a boon to any character able to channel negative energy, increasing the amount of damage dealt to living creatures by +2d6. This also increases the amount of damage healed by undead creatures. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be a 10th-level cleric; Cost 5,500 gp
